[115:19]have some mixed feelings about. I know that might sound surprising, but I'll tell you

[115:23]why I feel that way. Major, major breakthrough and development. First, the ADL received a

[115:31]ton of pushback and public pressure because they listed on their glossary of hate groups

[115:38]and individuals. This is a feature on their website where they catalog who they consider

[115:48]and other categories of extremists,

[115:51]they had listed on the website, Turning Point USA,

[115:55]as well as a faction of Christian identitarians

[115:59]or a so-called Christian identity movement.

[116:23]afterward, the director of the FBI, Cash Patel announced that the FBI would no longer work

[116:30]in collaboration with the ADL, which is a huge deal because the ADL has collaborated

[116:36]with the FBI for something like 80 years. And a lot of people said, this is an amazing

[116:46]This is a truly remarkable, a notable and remarkable development.

[116:51]And I would say it is, it is unambiguously positive.

[117:03]that works on behalf of the transnational Jewish community.
